name: NFX Gold, Inc.
description: NFX Gold, Inc. was a Canadian-based mining company previously listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol NFX. The company focused on the exploration and development of gold mineral properties. NFX Gold, Inc. ceased to exist as an independent publicly traded entity following a corporate merger in 2008, which resulted in its delisting from the exchange. Its historical operations were primarily centered on resource acquisition and mineral exploration activities within the mining sector.
